## Problem

What workflow or pain point should this improve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you want.

## Alternatives considered

What else did you try?

## Additional context

Add examples, screenshots, command output, or links if useful.

Do not include AppSecret, upload keys, private key files, or private QR codes.
